heading: Report on coordination of sanctions between the United States and the European Union
label: 9408 Report on coordination of sanctions between the United States and the European Union
notes: Delegation of FunctionsFor delegation of functions of President under this section to the Secretary of State, in consultation with the Secretary of the Treasury, see section 1(b)(v) of Memorandum of President of the United States, , 82 F.R. 50051, set out in a note under .Oct. 11, 2017section 9403 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: in which the United States has imposed sanctions with respect to a person for activity related to the proliferation of weapons of mass destruction or delivery systems for such weapons to or by Iran, support for acts of international terrorism by Iran, or human rights abuses in Iran, but in which the European Union has not imposed corresponding sanctions; and

children.label: B
children.text: in which the European Union has imposed sanctions with respect to a person for activity related to the proliferation of weapons of mass destruction or delivery systems for such weapons to or by Iran, support for acts of international terrorism by Iran, or human rights abuses in Iran, but in which the United States has not imposed corresponding sanctions.
An explanation for the reason for each discrepancy between sanctions imposed by the European Union and sanctions imposed by the United States described in subparagraphs (A) and (B) of paragraph (1).
in the case of the first report submitted under subsection (a), the period beginning on , and ending on the date the report is submitted; andAugust 2, 2017
in the case of a subsequent such report, the 180-day period preceding the submission of the report.

children.heading: Form of report
children.label: c Form of report
children.text: The report required by subsection (a) shall be submitted in unclassified form but may include a classified annex.
